subcodes.first_line: Detachment is as the sun; in whatsoever heart it doth shine it quencheth the fire of covetousness and self. He whose sight is illumined with the light of understanding will assuredly detach himself from the world and the vanities thereof…
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @greed; envy; covetousness; attachment to the world, @Manifestation of God as sun
